sys_ux_data_broker_transform.description: Data resource to get the snapshot from a public page.
sys_ux_data_broker_transform.name: PB Public Get Snapshot
sys_ux_data_broker_transform.props: [ { "name": "sysId", "label": "SysId of the Snapshot record", "fieldType": "string", "valueType": "object", "readOnly": false, "mandatory": true, "description": "" } ]
